hero.title: Spaces Crafted With Purpose
hero.subtitle: Award-winning interior design and fit-out solutions for residential, commercial, and hospitality projects across the UAE.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: From concept to completion, we deliver end-to-end interior design solutions tailored to your vision.

interior-design.title: Interior Design
interior-design.description: Bespoke interior concepts that balance aesthetics, functionality, and your personal style.

fit-out.title: Fit-Out
fit-out.description: Expert construction and fit-out execution with attention to craftsmanship and timelines.

space-planning.title: Space Planning
space-planning.description: Optimised floor plans that maximise flow, light, and utility within any footprint.

furniture-supply.title: Furniture Supply
furniture-supply.description: Curated furniture and décor sourced from leading international and regional brands.

lighting-design.title: Lighting Design
lighting-design.description: Ambient, task, and accent lighting schemes that define mood and highlight architecture.

project-management.title: Project Management
project-management.description: End-to-end oversight from brief to handover — on time, on budget, no surprises.

projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of residential, commercial, and hospitality spaces we have brought to life.

testimonials.title: Client Stories
testimonials.subtitle: Don't take our word for it — hear from the people we've had the privilege of working with.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Space?
cta.subtitle: Let's discuss your vision. Our design team is ready to bring it to life.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Fill in the form and our team will get back to you within 24 hours.

about.title: Crafting Spaces Since 2012
about.subtitle: Founded in Dubai, InStyle Creation has delivered over 350 premium interior projects across the UAE and the wider region.
